title: NecroForge
description: A Modpack made to increase your FPS in NeoForge and includes Iris shader for you to enjoy!
body:
A Modpack for FPS Boost, but for NeoForge.\
NecroForge is focusly made for FPS mods and ris Shader for you to enjoy the looks but with amazing FPS, no QoL mods to waste your space that doesn't serve a purpose on giving more FPS. In note, none of these mods are mine so please show positivy and love to these mod creators.

This Modpack includes Mods like Sodium, Lithium, and C2ME in this modpack for everyone to enjoy better FPS. Downloading my modpack makes me more motivated to make me try and test even hard to release a even better versions for you to enjoy!

<details>
<summary>PC Specs</summary>

- GeForce RTX 3050 "Type of GPU: Dedicated GPU", 
- Intel Core i5-8500, 
- 16 GB of DDR4 RAM, 2 GB is used for Minecraft, 
- Type of Pc: Tower PC

</details>

<details>
<summary>How to contact me for information, help, or glitches/crashes</summary>

Send me an Email to "https://discord.gg/BggfhEXNVW" for any questions, help with the Modpack, or recommendations, and I am always happy to listen.

If you want to send me a message/report for a glitch/crash, please send it to Report Issues, I would love to see messages/reports so I can fix the problem and give you a better experience from NanoFabric

</details>
